items.title: Crypto asset manager CoinShares to list on Nasdaq after $1.2 billion SPAC deal
items.summary: The listing makes CoinShares the latest crypto firm to go public and follows similar moves by BitGo, Circle, Bullish, and Gemini in recent years.

items.title: Strategy's STRC keeps dividend payout steady at 11.5% after seven straight increases
items.summary: The perpetual preferred yield holds at 11.5% for April as the 30-day volume weighted average price stabilizes near $100.

items.title: Australia passes crypto regulation requiring exchanges to obtain financial services licenses
items.summary: Exchanges and custody platforms must obtain financial services licenses within six months under the new framework.

items.title: Bitcoin’s drawdown is ‘less dramatic’ this cycle, Fidelity says
items.summary: A shallower Bitcoin drawdown than previous cycles "indicates a maturing market with reduced volatility and stronger institutional confidence," said Nick Ruck, director of LVRG Research.

items.title: Dorsey shares AI-integrated workplace vision weeks after Block’s 40% staff cut
items.summary: Block cut 4,000 of its staff in February as part of its AI-driven pivot. A new post by Block's Jack Dorsey has shed light on how the company and others might operate in the future.

items.title: Some quantum-resistant tokens jump 50% as Google flags risks to Bitcoin security
items.summary: The so-called quantum-resistant coins rally as traders switch to potential long-term security.

items.title: CFTC’s top enforcer puts prediction market insider traders on notice
items.summary: “There’s a myth in mainstream media and social media that insider trading doesn’t apply in the prediction markets … That is wrong,” said CFTC enforcement director David Miller.

items.title: E-commerce giant Mercado Libre to sunset rewards-based Mercado Coin: Report

items.title: These catalysts could bump bitcoin as Trump hands three-week target to end Iran war

items.title: Bitcoin is closer to its 'buy zone' than it's been in three years
items.summary: The gap between bitcoin's spot price and realized price is compressing toward levels that historically marked cycle bottoms, but the on-chain data shows the capitulation that typically precedes those bottoms hasn't happened.

items.title: Bitfarms loss widened to $285M as Bitcoin fell, but shares jump anyway
items.summary: Bitfarms said it was impacted by a decline in Bitcoin prices last year. The company is now five months into its pivot from Bitcoin mining to HPC and AI.

items.title: Solana DEX volumes drop to 2024 lows: Will SOL hold $80 as support?
items.summary: Solana’s declining DEX volumes raise the likelihood of a SOL price correction to $75, but the network’s DApp revenue highlights its resilience.

items.summary: Bitcoin held above $68,000 as investors reacted to signs Trump may seek a quicker end to the Iran war, though traders remain cautious.

items.title: Bitcoin enters the public bond market as Moody’s gives a first-of-its-kind crypto deal a rating
items.summary: A New Hampshire state authority is set to issue a first-of-its-kind bitcoin-backed bond with a Ba2 rating, marking an early test of how crypto can function as collateral inside traditional public finance markets.

items.title: Donald Trump says US will leave Iran within 2 to 3 weeks
items.summary: The conflict in Iran has been escalating following US and Israeli strikes against Iran in February, which sent oil prices higher and crypto and broader markets tumbling.

items.title: Crypto Fear & Greed Index stuck on ‘extreme fear,’ but is there a silver lining?

items.title: Texas Lt. Gov. calls for study of crypto, prediction markets

items.title: Wall Street moves benchmarks onchain as S&P tokenizes Treasurys index
items.summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices puts its iBoxx US Treasuries Index on the Canton Network, allowing institutions to access bond benchmark data through tokens rather than feeds.

items.title: Crypto Startup Uses Polymarket to Bet on Its Own Fundraise, Blindsiding Backers
items.summary: P2P.me was established to push boundaries, but the startup admitted that wagering on itself via Polymarket may have been a bridge too far.

items.title: If You Hold Solana on Magic Eden's Wallet, It's Time to Move It or Lose It
items.summary: Support for Magic Eden's crypto wallet is ending soon, meaning users will have to export their private keys to avoid losing access to funds.

items.summary: A critical vulnerability in Zcash node software could have allowed attackers to drain millions of dollars of ZEC from a deprecated shielded pool.
